input_rules: makeSurface info required; props optional
output_or_lifetime_rule: makeSurface returns caller-owned surface handle; getSurface/recorder/recordingContext return borrowed pointer
invalid_behavior: NULL canvas returns 0-or-NULL; factory failure returns 0
notes: Surface-backed canvas getSurface and makeSurface valid paths are smoke-covered; recorder/recordingContext remain nullable borrowed getters on CPU surfaces.

input_rules: isValid context optional
output_or_lifetime_rule: no ownership transfer
invalid_behavior: NULL image returns false-or-0
notes: Backend texture or Graphite specific C API was not exposed at this point.

input_rules: none
output_or_lifetime_rule: returns caller-owned matrix handle
invalid_behavior: NULL canvas returns 0
notes: Matrix getter ownership fixed by header and smoke.

receiver_rule: image required except refcount null no-op
input_rules: asLegacyBitmap bitmap required; legacyBitmapMode valid enum
output_or_lifetime_rule: bitmap is caller-owned output storage
invalid_behavior: refcount NULL no-op; unique false; asLegacyBitmap false
notes: Use this row before rechecking image refcount or legacy bitmap rules.

input_rules: bitmap/pixels/rowBytes required; props optional for MakeRasterDirect
output_or_lifetime_rule: pixel storage is caller-owned backing store and must outlive returned canvas
invalid_behavior: invalid input returns NULL-or-0; factory failure returns 0
notes: Bitmap-backed and direct borrowed-storage canvas factories are smoke-covered with valid rowBytes and caller-owned backing storage.

input_rules: quickReject geometry pointer required
output_or_lifetime_rule: no ownership transfer
invalid_behavior: numeric returns 0; bool returns false; mutation no-op
notes: State getters plus valid quickReject path/rect calls are smoke-covered; quickReject result is device/clip dependent.

input_rules: dstInfo/dstPixels or pixmap required; rowBytes valid; cachingHint valid; sampling required for scalePixels
output_or_lifetime_rule: caller-owned storage is not retained
invalid_behavior: invalid input returns false
notes: Pixmap rows require writable storage.

input_rules: info/srcRect/dstSize required as applicable; enums valid; callback optional no-op
output_or_lifetime_rule: callback result is callback-only
invalid_behavior: invalid input calls callback with NULL result when callback exists
notes: Existing phase D smoke covers minimal valid SkImage asyncRescaleAndReadPixels callback path; YUV/YUVA valid paths remain environment-sensitive.

input_rules: bitmap/pixmap/info/pixels required; rowBytes valid
output_or_lifetime_rule: caller-owned storage is not retained
invalid_behavior: invalid input returns false
notes: Covers canvas pixel I/O storage validation.

input_rules: count/array rules; optional colors; valid blend mode; valid handles
output_or_lifetime_rule: no ownership transfer; borrowed inputs not retained
invalid_behavior: invalid input is no-op
notes: Use this row before rechecking atlas or vertices draw rules.

input_rules: out bounds pointer required where applicable
output_or_lifetime_rule: returned size handle is caller-owned; bounds out params are caller-owned storage
invalid_behavior: invalid input returns 0-or-false

input_rules: none
output_or_lifetime_rule: imageInfo/dimensions/bounds handles are caller-owned; colorSpace pointer is borrowed; refColorSpace handle is caller-owned
invalid_behavior: NULL image returns 0-or-NULL
notes: Completed from batch HG next candidates; valid handle and borrowed colorSpace paths are covered.

input_rules: accessTopLayerPixels out params optional; peekPixels pixmap required
output_or_lifetime_rule: returned raw pointer or pixmap storage is borrowed from canvas
invalid_behavior: invalid input returns false-or-NULL
notes: Completed from batch HG next candidates; borrowed storage valid path was already covered and rechecked.

input_rules: context optional where exposed; cachingHint valid for raster factories
output_or_lifetime_rule: successful returned image handle is caller-owned
invalid_behavior: invalid input or factory failure returns 0
notes: Rechecked existing valid paths for makeRasterImage/makeRasterImageWithoutContext/makeNonTextureImage/withDefaultMipmaps; factory may validly return 0 when conversion is unavailable.

input_rules: image and geometry pointers required; paint optional; sampling required where applicable; enum values valid

notes: Valid drawImageRect, drawImageLattice, drawImageLatticeWithFilter, and drawImageNine paths are smoke-covered.

input_rules: enum values valid; AsCoeff out params required
output_or_lifetime_rule: Name returns borrowed static string
invalid_behavior: invalid enum returns false-or-NULL
notes: SkColorType has no dedicated C API helper file in this batch scope.

receiver_rule: capabilities optional for refcount no-op only

output_or_lifetime_rule: RasterBackend returns caller-owned const capabilities handle
invalid_behavior: NULL refcount no-op; NULL getter returns 0-or-false
notes: RasterBackend handle existence is smoke-covered; const handle is deleted by caller.

input_rules: decoder-specific APIs live in sk_*_decoder files
output_or_lifetime_rule: no direct ownership transfer in sk_codecs.h
invalid_behavior: not applicable
notes: Existing decoder-specific smoke covers factory/data/stream failure rules; this row records that sk_codecs.h is intentionally empty.

input_rules: geometry/colors/count required; tile mode valid; interpolation required for interpolation overloads; pos/localMatrix optional
output_or_lifetime_rule: successful shader handle is caller-owned

input_rules: DumpMemoryStatistics dump optional no-op; negative font cache count rejected

invalid_behavior: NULL pointer helpers return 0 false true or no-op by documented rule
notes: Representative subset covered; remaining large geometry API families stay eligible for later dedicated batches.

input_rules: profile inputs required; description optional; output buffers required
output_or_lifetime_rule: returned data handles are caller-owned
invalid_behavior: invalid input or factory failure returns 0; invalid buffer input no-op
notes: Valid output buffer helpers are smoke-covered; valid ICC profile data construction remains out of this batch scope.

input_rules: stream required; metadata optional
output_or_lifetime_rule: returned document handle is caller-owned

notes: Feature-gated RESKIA_ENABLE_PDF=ON build and c_skia_pdf_smoke cover document factories with and without metadata.

input_rules: base frequencies and octaves must be positive; tileSize optional
output_or_lifetime_rule: successful shader handle is caller-owned

input_rules: vector/point inputs required for dot and cross
output_or_lifetime_rule: Make and scale/cross helpers return caller-owned handles
invalid_behavior: NULL pointer input returns 0 false true or no-op by documented rule
notes: SkV2/SkV3/SkV4 vector smoke already exists; this batch covers the remaining SkPoint3 and SkIPoint pointer helper family.

api_pattern: RSXform toQuad/toTriStrip plus existing Matrix/M44 transform smoke
